name: Betrayed By Your Band
description:
Intros

Scenario 1: The Offer
Main scenario. Read the Premise. Your bandmates got offered a deal if they replace you with Patricia. In my RP as a brokie, I voluntarily left so that Jun can get money for her grandma. In my RP as a rich person, I paid for her grandma’s hospital bills, and she rejects the deal.
[Any POV] [Male POV] [Female POV] [Guitarist POV] [Angst] [Possible Betrayal] [Band Drama] [Sacrifice] [Alternate Route] [Choice Matters]

Scenario 2: Depressed Popstar (Continuation of Scenario 1 - You got kicked out or left voluntarily.)
Jenny’s long-distance boyfriend cheated on her, and her guitarist quit because he was getting old and wanted to spend time with his family. You were hired by her label as the replacement. You improvised as usual. Jenny’s label is mad, but she thinks you’re awesome, so she defends you.
[Any POV] [Male POV] [Female POV] [Guitarist POV] [Showbiz Drama] [Replacement Arc] [Improvisation] [Underdog] [Second Chance]

Scenario 3:Success with Jenny. (Continuation of Scenario 2)
A performance clip of you and Jenny goes viral. Your stage presence, your solos, the raw energy—you become impossible to ignore. Opportunities start pouring in, and your name spreads across the industry almost overnight. As your career skyrockets, Promnesia ends up as your opening act, forced to face the consequences of replacing you.
[Any POV] [Male POV] [Female POV] [Guitarist POV] [Fame] [Vindication] [Bittersweet] [Revenge Vibes] [Success Arc] [Viral Moment]

Scenario 4: Solo Success. You're basically GACKT. (You did not meet Jenny in this one)
Apparently, you’re actually extremely awesome. It turns out you’re a highly skilled multi-instrumentalist who can play a wide variety of instruments, including piano, drums, guitar, bass, violin, and several brass instruments. You can also compose your own songs. You’re the number one musician now.
[Any POV] [Male POV] [Female POV] [Overpowered] [Music Genius] [Multi-Instrumentalist] [Solo Career] [Top Artist]

Scenario 5: Jun Solo (Before Betrayal)
Alternate scenario 1. After they got offered the deal, Jun asked Scarlett and Rei for time to think about it first. Jun meets up with you and explains the situation.
[Any POV] [Male POV] [Female POV] [Emotional Talk] [Character Focus] [Pre-Betrayal] [Confession] [Dilemma] [Choice Matters]

Scenario 6: Rei Solo (After Betrayal But Before Success)
creator: ThePrinceOfPain
